Klasse CsvReader

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input.dataReader.CsvReader
public class CsvReader extends Object
A DataReader implementation for importing data from CSV files.

This reader uses the OpenCSV library to parse CSV files line by line and returns the raw content as a list of String[] objects, where each array represents a row of the CSV file. The class also handles common exceptions such as I/O errors or invalid CSV formatting and reports them through the provided ConsoleOutput instance.

Typical use cases include loading configuration data, datasets, or evolutionary algorithm input structures from external CSV sources.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • CsvReader

      public CsvReader(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
      Creates a new CsvReader instance.
      Parameter:
      consoleOutput - the console output handler used to print error messages

  • Methodendetails

    • importData

      public List<String[]> importData(String filePath)

    • importData

      public List<String[]> importData(String filePath, String targetBlock)
      Imports data from the CSV file located at the given file path.

      Each line of the CSV file is read and stored as a String[] entry. If the file cannot be read or contains invalid CSV formatting, an appropriate error message is printed to the console.

      Parameter:
      enteredFilepath - the path to the CSV file to be imported
      Gibt zurück:
      a list of String[] entries representing the raw CSV data; an empty list is returned if an error occurs
